2950686.title: SpongeBob
2950686.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

2950767.title: Regenboog Vlinder Eenhoorn Kitten
2950767.description: Miguel invites Chippy, a cute chipmunk-like creature, to join him and Felicity on their friend-iversary, but Chippy isn't all she seems! // Felicity tries a little too hard to be purr-fect and somehow loses both her powers and her confidence.

2950825.title: Regenboog Vlinder Eenhoorn Kitten
2950825.description: The friends join a scouting group but Felicity has a hard time winning the praise of her scoutmaster. // When Moona announces she's closing Mythic Malts, Felicity tries to get Moona to fall back in love with her job, but the plan backfires.

2950909.title: Dorg van Dango
2950909.description: Sick of caring for Fretta's favorite flower, Dorg and the gang cast a spell to keep it out of their hair. // Dorg wants to win the top prize for selling Adventure Club cookies.

2951624.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
2951624.description: Lemmy the robot returns from Mars.  Unknowingly a space squid has stowed away in his chest cavity. // Careless Alice over chlorinates the otter habitat and Marlene's fur is bleached.  Her new look captivates the attention of the other zoo animals.

2951667.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
2951667.description: The zoo animals are suffering a heat wave. The penguins have a plan to beat the heat, but they need Alice out of the way. With her gone, they get to work. // Private is smitten with the zoo nurse. The only way he can see her is if he gets injured.

2951733.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
2951733.description: To prove that Turtles can be friends with humans, Michelangelo uses a social networking site to befriend Chris Bradford, a famous martial artist who is secretly Shredder's top lieutenant.

2951775.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
2951775.description: When the Turtles sneak out against Splinter's wishes (to go to a movie with April), they battle Baxter Stockman, a deranged inventor in mechanical battle armor.

2951844.title: Fairly Odd Parents
2951844.description: After what seems like forever, Mom and Dad have finally gotten hip to the fact that Timmy has fairy godparents. The question now is: how long can they keep Jorgen in the dark so that he won't take Wanda, Cosmo and Poof away forever?

2952570.title: Fairly Odd Parents
2952570.description: Timmy and the fairies have to rid his home of fairy dust. The basement comes alive. Mom and Dad go to a fake spa.

2952614.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
2952614.description: Dave is concerned that The Chipmunks have become too obsessed with their latest video game. But when they challenge Dave to play the game before judging it, Dave becomes even more addicted than The Chipmunks.

2952636.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
2952636.description: Grounded once again, Alvin begs Theodore to buy him the skateboard he's always wanted. But, Theodore gets sidetracked by his sweet tooth and squanders all of Alvin's money on candy instead. Now Theodore is forced to make up an improbable story.

2952672.title: SpongeBob
2952672.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

2952715.title: SpongeBob
2952715.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.

2952776.title: SpongeBob
2952776.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.
